snippet: The section covers: accepting students. DE International Education Division (IED) is required under the National Code of Practice for Providers of Education and Training to Overseas Students 2018 (Cth) (the National Code) External Link to assess whether prospective international students have an appropriate academic background and level of English language proficiency to participate actively and successfully complete their course. Entry requirements are set to ensure that an international student can complete their course without relying unduly on ongoing English language or learning support. In relation to this section, schools must ensure that they use the following documents and retain them for audit purposes: 2.
